constraints: Stage 1 proves movement aiming four-weapon combat enemy readability room traversal quick restart and voluntary repeat-run desire with temporary content
Stage 2 produces one complete factory level with reliable saves checkpoints loot risk shop strongboxes completion replay scalable effects and diagnostic evidence
Broader content production begins only after both gates pass
Predeclare evidence and kill criteria before testing
Developer voluntary replay and mastery pursuit comes first
A small external target-player group must then demonstrate genuine repeat-play interest
Failure at either stage keeps the project in prototype iteration
Declare tester counts and thresholds before each formal round
Replay behavior determines pass or fail while feedback explains causes
Observe voluntary restarts loadout trials mastery or record chasing and later return interest
Do not count testing-obligation behavior as genuine replay desire
Do not retroactively weaken thresholds
After a limited predeclared number of failed rounds perform a written diagnosis
Allow one substantial evidence-backed pivot with a fresh gate
Stop or shelve if the pivot still fails
Do not advance while evidence remains ambiguous
First test curated fixed four-weapon loadouts
Then add a tiny nonpersistent randomized reward layer
Use the second pass to measure added discovery and experimentation value
Defer mature economy inventory rarity progression shop strongbox and save integration to Stage 2
Use a rapidly resettable arena for controlled mechanical comparison
Use a compact interconnected route for navigation pacing and route mastery
Reuse temporary weapons enemies and art
Neither environment must become the final factory level
Support several meaningful four-weapon combinations
Cover representative automatic heavy spread or burst beam charge or heat homing or utility and unusual synergy behavior
Gameplay behavior and readability must be representative despite temporary assets
Do not require the full authored MVP roster before the fun gate
Include close pressure ranged projectile and area denial roles
Add one tougher elite without building the full climax
Use mixed encounters to test priority readability movement and synergy
Defer remaining roles and upgraded droid climax to Stage 2
Use coherent temporary art and audio
Make telegraphs hit feedback silhouettes projectiles hazards pickups HUD and weapon readiness representative
Include reduced effects camera feedback controls and performance instrumentation
Defer final assets music cinematics and cosmetic polish
Formal builds support repeated complete runs without routine crashes or progression blockers
Restart loadout controls and settings persistence work consistently
Representative combat remains near target frame rate with diagnostics for major failures
Technically ruined sessions are excluded from fun-gate evidence and counted as reliability failures
Minor visual and noncritical defects remain acceptable

open_questions_added: How much representative polish the complete factory slice requires
Content-addition throughput proof before broader production
Stage 2 save interruption and recovery test matrix
Target-player recruitment and formal test-round sizes

next_action.instruction: Ask exactly one concise A/B/C decision card selecting what the complete one-level Stage 2 slice must demonstrate before broader content production: end-to-end feature completeness only; near-public-demo polish; or a representative production-ready slice that is complete and reliable while also proving that a new room enemy and weapon can be added through documented repeatable pipelines without core-system rework. Preserve the automated-weapons-factory level, real saves checkpoints banking loot shop strongboxes difficulty completion replay performance diagnostics and offline Windows requirements. Include content throughput maintainability automated tests placeholder tolerance performance and save reliability scope risk and what may remain deferred. Put the recommendation after all options. Begin a new D-211 through D-220 batch unless the cadence changes.
